content:
flowchart LR
    A[Intermittent Fasting Family] --> B[Time-Restricted Eating]
    A --> C[Alternate-Day Fasting]
    A --> D[5:2 Protocol]
    A --> E[Fasting-Mimicking Diet]
    C --> C1["Evidence base 3"]
    C --> C2["7 trials, 269 adults"]
    C --> C3["4-48 week duration"]
    C --> C4["Body weight endpoint"]
    A --> F["Metabolic Syndrome Focus 1"]
    F --> F1["Central adiposity"]
    F --> F2["Dyslipidemia"]
    F --> F3["Elevated BP"]
    F --> F4["Impaired glucose"]
